top_signals.title: Southern Water Gets £300m Equity as Asterion Joins Macquarie
top_signals.summary: Southern Water Ltd. reached a target to raise £1.2 billion ($1.6 billion) in equity to fund major network upgrades after securing the final tranche of investment from a new shareholder.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: In selling arms, China is still no superpower
top_signals.summary: In fact, China's strategy of avoiding military entanglements and binding security commitments is one of the reasons why it struggles to break through in the export market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Babcock predicts global government defence spending spree after hit to profit
top_signals.summary: Babcock said it had suffered a £140m financial hit due to delays in a contract with the Royal Navy but reiterated its financial targets for the next year, predicting high spending as global governments plough cash into defence. Profit before tax slumped to £267.2m from £339.4m in the prior year after problems with its Type [...]

top_signals.title: The world needs an answer on climate finance – it’s London
top_signals.summary: The UK is the largest market globally for project-level financing for clean energy, the biggest in Europe for private investment in green tech, and has topped the global green finance centre rankings for eight consecutive edition, says Dame Susan Langley As the City of London Corporation marks the fifth instalment of the Net Zero Delivery [...]
